title: Pay to Anchor
description: Pay to Anchor is a keyless witness output pattern that leaves a compact fee-bumping hook in a transaction so a later child can improve confirmation without requiring privileged key material.

resources.title: BIP 433: Pay to Anchor
resources.notes: Draft specification for the keyless P2A output and its standard relay behavior.

resources.title: Bitcoin Optech: Pay to Anchor
resources.notes: Optech groups P2A with ephemeral anchors and documents the fee-bumping context.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background on Bitcoin outputs, transaction fees, and child-pays-for-parent fee bumping.
